title: Lead Instructional Designer at TeamLease Skills University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at TeamLease Skills University
jsonLd.description:
Join the TeamLease Skills University family as a Instructional Designer in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TeamLease Skills University:
TeamLease Skills University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TeamLease Skills University!
